metadata.no_auto_align_reason: Accepted r03 has recent TrackCenter and multiple completed pODMR/Ramsey jobs with final counts >=38 kcps; use explicit tracked position and avoid hidden target reselection.

analysis_plan.skip_tau0_context: The scan starts at 48 ns to avoid the tau=0 artifact from prior Ramsey; do not infer from tau=0.
analysis_plan.notes: Review terminal raw/readouts before any T2star or 13C claim. If still non-claim-grade, avoid further blind Ramsey repeats on r03.

metadata.frequency_basis: fine weak-pi pODMR terminal raw/readout review selected grid-supported mw_freq=3.8759 GHz; no sub-grid precision claim.
metadata.det_choice_reason: Keep det=1.0 MHz from the previous diagnostic so the only scientific change is short-tau/high-SNR early-time sampling; this tests whether the carrier is hidden by very short T2* or tau=0/baseline artifacts.
metadata.tau_window_reason: Use 48 ns..1.968 us in 41 points: starts after tau=0 artifact, uses 48 ns sample-grid spacing, samples nearly two 1 MHz cycles, and concentrates shots where T2* could be very short.
metadata.shot_reason: Use 12 x 90000 = 1.08e6 shots per tau point to improve projected median raw SEM from 1.92 kcps to about 1.17 kcps while keeping per-average tracking window bounded by repetitions rather than averages.
metadata.even_average_reason: Use 12 averages under snake/even-average guidance; recent terminal drift diagnostics flagged no averages.
metadata.intent: Short-tau high-SNR Ramsey diagnostic on accepted r03 after two non-claim-grade 8 us Ramsey datasets; test very-short-T2*/early-time carrier visibility, not a blind repeat.

recipe.name: xml_generic_v1
notes: Generic XML route backed by a sequence manifest.
This is the only mainline recipe in the bridge; ODMR, Rabi, Ramsey, and future sequences should all enter through xml_generic_v1.
validate_job.m resolves sequence_manifest_id and enforces manifest bounds before any execute path is reached; job sample_id owns target identity.
Execute remains subject to the same explicit lab-only opt-in gate used by earlier curated routes.
Archived curated wrappers and recipe definitions are preserved under claw/legacy for historical reference only.

manifest.label: ramsey
manifest.description: Auto-generated validated manifest for ramsey.xml under the approved sequence root.
notes: Auto-generated from an existing XML sequence under SavedSequences/SavedSequences-AWG.
Boolean variables are recorded in typed_vars but are not yet forwarded by the current numeric float_vars bridge contract: do_adiabatic_inversion
Default OpenClaw scan uses tau with a conservative 3-point sweep.
Loaded sequence manifest from <MATLAB_23C_ROOT>\claw\sequence_manifests\validated\auto__ramsey.json.

tracking_cadence_policy.does_not_change: Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults
Imaging GUI or legacy Experiment tracking_period defaults

guidance.shot_preservation_guidance: When the predicted per-average tracking window is too long, first reduce repetitions per average and compensate by increasing averages so repetitions * averages remains as close as possible to the original total shots. If that is still insufficient, split the acquisition into shorter jobs. Reduce total shots only as a last resort.
adjustment_priority: raise averages to preserve repetitions * averages whenever possible
split the acquisition into shorter jobs before reducing total shots
reduce total shots only as a last resort
